title: February 24
content:
<noinclude>{{Top|real|nocat=1}}
{{Month|February|hide30=yes|hide31=yes}}

'''February 24''' is the 55th day of the year. There are 310 days remaining, 311 in leap years.</noinclude>

*[[1960s#1968|1968]] – [[Steven Melching]] is born.
*[[1981]] – [[Star Wars (1977) 47|''Star Wars'' (1977) 47]] published.
*[[1999]] – [[Boba Fett: Enemy of the Empire 2|''Boba Fett: Enemy of the Empire'' 2]] published.
*1999 – [[Star Wars Manga: The Empire Strikes Back 2|''Star Wars Manga: The Empire Strikes Back'' 2]] published.
*[[2004]] – [[Star Wars Insider 74|''Star Wars Insider'' 74]] released to newsstands.
*[[2006]] – [[Attack on Endor|''Star Wars Miniatures: Attack on Endor'']] released.
*[[2010]] – [[Legacy (2006) 45|''Legacy'' (2006) 45]] published.
*[[2012]] – "[[Massacre]]" airs on [[Cartoon Network]].
*[[2015]] – ''[[Honor Among Thieves]]'' paperback published.
*[[2016]] – [[Kanan 11|''Kanan'' 11]] published.
*2016 – "[[The Honorable Ones]]" airs on [[Disney XD]].
*2016 – [[Star Wars Rebels Magazine 15|''Star Wars Rebels'' Magazine 15]] published in the United Kingdom.
*[[2019]] – "[[The Disappeared]]" airs on [[Disney Channel]].
*[[2022]] – [[Lev Mailer]] dies.
*[[2026]] – [[Star Wars Insider 236|''Star Wars Insider'' 236]] published.
<noinclude>
